mainObjective: Debug 404 errors in Cray Cray for Parlays app, specifically NCAAB Easy Money mode failing while AI Edge works

keyIssuesIdentified.primaryIssue: Easy Money mode returns 404-like errors while AI Edge works for NCAAB
keyIssuesIdentified.rootCause: Parameter mismatch - frontend sends 'sport' (singular) but backend expects 'selectedSports' (plural array)
keyIssuesIdentified.secondaryIssue: Easy Money mode filters for moneyline favorites with negative odds, but NCAAB data primarily has spreads with -110 juice odds
keyIssuesIdentified.technicalDebt: Default fallback to NFL when sport parameter not properly mapped

investigationProcess: Discovery: Issue actually in Railway backend
Deep dive: ErrorContext ReferenceError in suggest-picks.js
Multiple attempts to fix scope issues with errorContext variable
Reverted to working state after user feedback about breaking changes
Final analysis using GitHub MCP and codebase examination

attempted: Refactored market type filtering in suggest-picks.js
Multiple attempts to fix errorContext scope issues
Added debug logging for Easy Money mode
reverted: All changes reverted to commit c72fcd7 after user feedback
Returned to known working state before debugging session
changesMade.currentWorkingState: Commit c72fcd7 - 'Fix NCAAB data sync and AI rate limit issues'

keyTables: odds_cache - stores betting odds by market type
ai_suggestions - tracks AI predictions with outcomes
game_analysis - pre-analyzed games with moneyline/spread data

ncaabDataIssue.problem: Easy Money mode looks for negative moneyline odds (favorites to win outright) but NCAAB data has spreads with -110 juice odds
ncaabDataIssue.missing: True moneyline favorites in NCAAB dataset

errorAnalysis.aiEdgeError: Returns 'No betting opportunities found for selected criteria' (HTTP 200 with error body)
errorAnalysis.easyMoneyError: Returns 'Failed to generate pick suggestions' with 'sportKeys is not defined' (HTTP 500)
errorAnalysis.difference: AI Edge fails early with no data, Easy Money gets further but hits scope error

mcpConfiguration.issues: Docker permission errors preventing MCP server startup

userRequests.primary: Debug 404 errors for NCAAB Easy Money mode
userRequests.secondary: Add predictions history page showing AI success rates
userRequests.tertiary: Add copy button for selecting multiple AI suggestions
userRequests.constraint: Don't break existing functionality that was working

solutionsIdentified.immediate: Fix sport vs selectedSports parameter mapping in suggest-picks.js
solutionsIdentified.enhancement: Update Easy Money logic to handle spread favorites for college sports
solutionsIdentified.verification: Run SQL queries to check actual NCAAB market types available

recommendedActionPlan: Fix parameter mapping: const finalSelectedSports = sport ? [sport] : (selectedSports || ['NFL']);
Test both AI Edge and Easy Money with NCAAB
Enhance Easy Money to include spread favorites (teams giving points)
Re-add features once core functionality stable
lessonsLearned: Always verify working state before making changes
Parameter mismatches can cause subtle but critical issues
Different generation modes can have different failure paths
College sports betting data differs from pro sports (more spreads, fewer moneylines)
MCP setup requires proper Docker permissions

nextSteps.immediate: Apply minimal fix for parameter mapping
nextSteps.testing: Verify both modes work with NCAAB data
nextSteps.enhancement: Improve Easy Money logic for college sports
nextSteps.features: Re-implement predictions history and copy features
